notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman José Ramírez. Cam Smith to 2nd. Cam Smith advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman José Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. José Ramírez out at 2nd. Kyle Manzardo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bo Naylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bo Naylor pops out to first baseman Christian Walker on the infield fly rule.

notableEvents.label: George Valera GIDP
notableEvents.detail: George Valera grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. George Valera out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Correa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Correa grounds into a double play, first baseman Kyle Manzardo to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to pitcher Cade Smith. Brice Matthews to 3rd. Daniel Johnson out at 2nd. Carlos Correa out at 1st.
